mapper.select: SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT DISTINCT rm.menu_id FROM sys_role_menu rm INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission_code FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.permission_code IS NOT NULL AND m.permission_code != ''
